title: Grilled Jamon and Cheese Tapas
description: A simple yet delicious Spanish tapas dish featuring grilled jamon and melty cheese. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the Jamon Iberico into thin strips.
Slice the Melty Cheese and Spanish Cheese into thin pieces.
Assemble the tapas by placing a piece of Melty Cheese on top of a piece of Jamon Iberico.
Place the Spanish Cheese on top of the Melty Cheese.
Grill the tapas for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the cheese is melted.
Optionally, serve with a piece of Spanish Bread for dipping in olive oil.
